title: CompetitiveTask
description: A single benchmark task that every framework adapter (bad, browser-use, stagehand, ...) can execute and that produces a deterministic pass/fail verdict.

id.description: Stable identifier (kebab-case). Used as the cell key in result reports.

goal.description: Natural-language goal handed to the agent verbatim. Must be self-contained — every framework gets the same string.

startUrl.description: Starting URL. Use the literal placeholder __FIXTURE_BASE_URL__ for local fixtures; the runner substitutes it with the static fixture server URL at execution time.

fixture.description: Optional path under bench/fixtures/ that the static fixture server should expose. Required when startUrl uses __FIXTURE_BASE_URL__.

oracle.description: How the runner verifies success. Every adapter calls oracle.evaluate(rawResult, page?) → boolean.

expectedText.description: Substring that must appear in the final page snapshot or visible page text.

expectedUrlFragment.description: Substring that must appear in the final URL.

expectedShape.description: Lite JSON-shape match: every key in expectedShape must be present in the agent's structured result. Values are matched only when the expectedShape value is non-null (literal equality) or a regex string starting with `re:`.

selector.description: CSS selector that must exist with the given text content in the final page.
